hero.title:
No Cap.
No Fake.
hero.subtitle: Built for the concrete. Engineered for the future. Every thread, every seam, every drop is meticulously designed to push boundaries. We believe in extreme typographic contrast, brutalist utility, and gear that speaks louder through its form than its logo. Wear the truth.
welcome.member_desc: SKIP THE LINE. SECURE THE RAREST DROPS. JOIN THE EXCLUSIVE SYNDICATE.
faq.a1: We release limited quantities on a schedule. Once a drop sells out, it's gone for good. Members get early access to select drops.
faq.a2: Membership is free. It gives you early access to drops, exclusive products, and free shipping on all orders.
faq.a3: Yes, we ship globally. Shipping costs and times are calculated at checkout based on your location.
faq.a4: You have 30 days to return your items in original condition. Members get free return shipping.
trust.legit_desc: All releases undergo curated and multi-layered authenticity verification. Zero tolerance for counterfeits.
trust.premium_desc: Curating collections that use heavyweight materials with global standard precision stitching.
trust.dswt_desc: Deadstock with Tags. Guaranteed in brand new condition and 100% perfect during unboxing.

about.title: ABOUT US
about.desc1: We are a premium streetwear brand born in the concrete jungle.
about.desc2: Our mission is to bridge the gap between high-end fashion and everyday utility. Every piece is designed with intent, constructed with premium materials, and tested in the streets.
about.desc_full: Born from the streets of Condong Catur, Sleman. No Cap is more than a brand; it's a movement. We reject the superfluous and embrace the essential. Inspired by brutalist architecture and functional utility, our garments are engineered for those who speak less and do more.

membership.hero_desc: The ultimate key to the culture. Get exclusive access to the rarest drops, member-only products, and free shipping on every order.
membership.faq1_q: What exactly is the No Cap Membership?
membership.faq1_a: It's an exclusive ecosystem designed for true culture enthusiasts. While the Standard tier lets you save items, our Verified and Grail tiers elevate your status, giving you priority access to rare drops before they sell out, along with massive savings on shipping.
membership.faq2_q: Why should I upgrade to Cap Verified?
membership.faq2_a: If you buy at least one item a month, Cap Verified pays for itself. You eliminate all shipping costs and get a 1-hour head start on drops. In the sneaker and streetwear game, 1 hour is the difference between securing your size or paying resale prices.
membership.faq3_q: What is the Grail Status 'Rare Item Guarantee'?
membership.faq3_a: Grail members are guaranteed the right to purchase at least one highly coveted, limited-stock item every month at retail price. No bots, no lotteries, just guaranteed heat.
membership.faq4_q: How does the free shipping work?
membership.faq4_a: It's completely automatic. Once your account is upgraded to Verified or Grail, our checkout system recognizes your tier and instantly deducts all standard shipping fees.
membership.faq5_a: Grail members get access to a hidden section of the store featuring deadstock items, unreleased samples, and restocks of past iconic drops that the general public will never see.
membership.faq6_q: Are the memberships billed monthly? Can I cancel?
membership.faq6_a: Yes, Verified and Grail tiers are billed on a month-to-month basis. There are no long-term contracts. You can cancel your subscription at any time right from your dashboard.
membership.faq7_q: Is the upgrade worth it if I only buy occasionally?
membership.faq7_a: Absolutely. Even if you only cop one major drop a year, the early access guarantees you get it for retail. Plus, the flat discounts on Cap Verified and Grail statuses apply instantly.
membership.faq8_q: Do the membership discounts stack with other sales?
membership.faq8_a: Yes, your flat 5% (Verified) or 10% (Grail) discount is applied on top of any seasonal sales we might run, making it the most cost-effective way to shop No Cap.
